overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking along the edge of a desert canyon. The player navigates narrow rocky ledges with steep drops into the canyon below, featuring realistic rock textures and sparse vegetation. The bright midday sun casts harsh shadows across the terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon rim plateau with panoramic views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the flat rocky rim of the canyon, taking in the expansive desert landscape

entered.detail: flat rocky ground with rough texture underfoot
layered rock formations and mesas visible on the horizon
sharp drop-off marking the edge of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide rocky plateau at the canyon's edge. The camera moves forward along flat terrain with distant mesas visible against the clear blue sky. The canyon rim drops off to the right, revealing the vast desert landscape beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep cliff edge with vertical drop

events.description: moving from flat plateau onto steep cliff edge with immediate vertical drop-off into canyon

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the narrow cliff edge, looking down into the steep canyon depths

entered.detail: vertical rock wall dropping sharply into the canyon below
deep gorge with layered rock walls visible below
shadow of the player character cast on the rocky ground

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions to a steep cliff edge with a dramatic vertical drop. The camera moves along the narrow path with the deep canyon visible to the right. The character's shadow appears on the rocky surface as the path descends slightly along the cliff face.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliff ledge with steep walls

events.description: character shadow becomes prominently visible on the rocky slope as the sun angle changes

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrow cliff ledge with the steep drop visible to the left

entered.detail: small green bushes growing from cracks in the rock face

segments.scene_description: The path continues along a narrow cliff ledge with steep rock walls rising on the right and the canyon depths falling away to the left. The character's shadow moves across the rocky surface as they progress. Sparse vegetation begins to appear along the cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: vegetated cliff path with scattered bushes

events.description: green vegetation and small trees become prominent along the cliff path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cliff path passing scattered green bushes and small trees growing from the rocks

entered.detail: lush green shrubs and small trees growing along the cliff edge
opposite side of the canyon visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a narrow cliff path with increased vegetation including green bushes and small trees growing from the rocky crevices. The canyon depths remain visible to the left while the path continues along the steep terrain. The distant canyon rim is visible across the gorge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins on a wide, open plateau and gradually narrows into a precarious cliffside path. It begins by moving forward across flat rocky terrain with distant mesas under a clear blue sky, while the canyon rim drops away to the right. As the camera progresses, the terrain shifts into a steep cliff edge where the path descends slightly and the character's shadow stretches across the rocky surface beside a dramatic vertical drop. The scene then tightens as the path clings to a narrow ledge with steep walls rising on one side and the canyon depths falling away on the other. Finally, the environment becomes more lush as the camera moves past green bushes and small trees growing from rocky crevices, keeping the distant canyon rim in view across the gorge.
